sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73231" key="o(lo/litos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλό-λῑτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">entirely of fine linen,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σουδάριον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">PMag.Osl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.268</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
